supportPage.title: Taimako ngəla Aiki Nyamdu kəlaa do nguwu
supportPage.subtitle: Miqdar wuji kəla wuraram, kungiyaram, da tim kaibəram kəlaa nyamdu-aiki e platform zamani ngəla bayyana, sauri, da kulawa.
supportPage.description: Miqdar tsari ERP zamani ne ngəla tsara kəlaa sauƙaƙa aiki nyamdu e manyan wurare. Yana haɗa aiki ɗowu da gudanarwa e platform gooto ngəla sauƙin anfani.
supportPage.extra: Ko ka na kula da nyamdu-aiki na kullum ko ka na tsara tallafi ngam manyan taruka, Miqdar na ba goɓɓo tsari da gani ngəla ake bukata ngam aiki curoso.
supportPage.heroNote: Tsarin tallafinmu an tsara shi ngam taimaka wa goɓɓo warware matsala da sauri, fahimtar hanyoyin aiki, da cigaba da sabis ba tare da tangarda ba.
supportPage.featuresTitle: Yadda Miqdar ke Taimaka wa Goɓɓo
supportPage.feature1Text: Samu taimako kan anfani da platform, fahimtar tsari, da tallafin aikin kullum.
supportPage.feature2Text: Gudanar da tallafin ciyarwa na taro tare da kyakkyawan tsari, aiwatarwa mai laushi, da sadarwa a sarari.
supportPage.feature3Text: Rage jinkiri ta tallafi mai tsari ngəla ke taimaka wa ƙungiyoyi warware tambayoyin aiki cikin inganci.
supportPage.sectionTitle: An Gina Shi Domin Muhallin Aikin Nyamdu Mai Buƙata
supportPage.sectionText: Miqdar an gina shi domin kungiyoyi ngəla ke buƙatar sarrafa aikin nyamdu cikin dogaro a sassa, wurare, da matatun sabis da dama.
supportPage.contactText: Kungiyar tallafinmu tana shirye domin taimaka da tambayoyin platform, jagorar aiki, da buƙatun sabis.
supportPage.statsTitle: Taimako ngəla za ka dogara da shi
supportPage.help1: Jagora kan platform da hanyoyin aiki
supportPage.help4: Tambayoyi na gama gari kan sabis da tallafi
